allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('c:/Projects/Career_Evaluation/data/applicants/8c9659ad-2f9a-4d82-98af-0c6a20a94f46.json','utf-8'\)\); const wh=d.extractionResult?.certificate?.work_history || []; console.log\('=== work_history ==='\); wh.forEach\(\(w,i\)=>console.log\(i, w.company_name, w.period_start, '~', w.period_end\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('c:/Projects/Career_Evaluation/data/applicants/8c9659ad-2f9a-4d82-98af-0c6a20a94f46.json','utf-8'\)\); console.log\('Keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\); const er = d.extractionResult; if\(er\) { console.log\('ER keys:', Object.keys\(er\)\); if\(er.certificate\) { console.log\('Cert keys:', Object.keys\(er.certificate\)\); console.log\('WH:', JSON.stringify\(er.certificate.work_history, null, 2\)\); } }")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('c:/Projects/Career_Evaluation/data/applicants/8c9659ad-2f9a-4d82-98af-0c6a20a94f46.json','utf-8'\)\); const cd = d.extractionResult?.certificateData; if\(cd\) { console.log\('CertData keys:', Object.keys\(cd\)\); const wh = cd.work_history || []; console.log\('work_history count:', wh.length\); wh.forEach\(\(w,i\)=>console.log\(i, w.company_name, w.period_start, '~', w.period_end\)\); }")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('c:/Projects/Career_Evaluation/data/applicants/8c9659ad-2f9a-4d82-98af-0c6a20a94f46.json','utf-8'\)\); const tc = d.extractionResult?.certificateData?.technical_career || []; const posco = tc.filter\(c => c.company_name && c.company_name.includes\('포스코'\)\); console.log\('포스코 technical_career:', posco.length, '건'\); posco.forEach\(\(c,i\) => console.log\(i, c.company_name, c.project_name, c.period_start, '~', c.period_end\)\)")
